---
name: '📖 Documentation Request'
about: Suggest an improvement to the READMEs, architecture guides, or setup manuals
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

**Which component needs better documentation?**
- [ ] Root `README.md`
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] `AWS_CONFIGURATION.md`
- [ ] `server/README.md`
- [ ] `web/README.md`
- [ ] `build-container/README.md`
- [ ] `s3-reverse-proxy/README.md`

**Describe the improvement**
A clear description of what is missing or unclear (e.g., "The ECS setup guide needs more screenshots").

**Proposed Content (if known)**
Any snippets of text or documentation that would help improve the project.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or references here.
